inventory.feed_disclaimer: All prices exclude tax, title, license, and dealer fees. Prices are subject to change without notice. Not responsible for typographical errors. See dealer for complete details.

vehicle.description: One-owner, clean Carfax, no accidents. Loaded Touring model with heated leather seats, sunroof, and Honda Sensing suite. Full service history available.
vehicle.seller_notes: This vehicle passed our 182-point inspection. Oil changed and new cabin filter installed at intake. Minor curb rash on right rear wheel, see photos. Factory warranty remaining until 04/2027 or 60,000 miles.
vehicle.disclaimer: Price excludes tax, title, registration, dealer fee, and any finance charges. Confirm availability and equipment with dealer prior to purchase.

vehicle.description: Excellent condition Tesla Model 3 Long Range with Full Self-Driving capability. Premium interior, autopilot, and all software updates current.
vehicle.seller_notes: Battery health at 94% as of last diagnostic. New tires installed at 27,000 miles. Ceramic coating applied. Includes home charging cable and J1772 adapter. Minor paint correction on front bumper, documented in photos.
vehicle.disclaimer: Electric vehicle range may vary based on driving conditions, temperature, and battery age. Listed range is manufacturer estimate for a new vehicle.

vehicle.description: Certified Pre-Owned Jeep Grand Cherokee Limited 4x4. Premium Nappa leather, panoramic sunroof, and advanced safety features. 7-year/100,000-mile powertrain warranty included.
vehicle.seller_notes: CPO vehicle with extended warranty. Brake pads replaced at 40,000 miles. Transmission fluid serviced. One prior lease return, clean title. Slight wear on driver seat bolster consistent with mileage.
vehicle.disclaimer: Certified warranty coverage and eligibility should be independently confirmed with the selling dealer at time of purchase.

vehicle.description: Sport-line equipped 330i xDrive with M Sport suspension. Premium Package, Harman Kardon audio, and head-up display. Outstanding driver's car in excellent condition.
vehicle.seller_notes: Traded in by a long-term customer. Full BMW dealer service history on file. Front tires recently replaced with run-flats. No warning lights, all systems functional.
vehicle.disclaimer: Luxury-brand service, maintenance, and replacement part costs may be higher than non-luxury vehicles.

vehicle.description: Popular XLT SuperCrew 4x4 with the 2.7L EcoBoost. Chrome appearance package, spray-in bedliner, and tow package. Ready for work or weekends.
vehicle.seller_notes: Bed has minor surface scratches from normal use. Tailgate operates properly. All four tires at 7/32 tread depth. Service records from Ford dealership available. Tow package rated for 8,500 lbs.
vehicle.disclaimer: Towing capacity varies based on equipment, payload, and configuration. Verify towing and payload ratings before use.
